creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
tabthorpe    2010-10-25 04:20:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    net                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    net/wackford-squeers Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Wackford and Squeers are the client and server, respectively, of the SHYTE
  plain text network hypertext system.  SHYTE is a plain text alternative to
  the web.  The very first SHYTE site may be visited via wackford at
  <mammothcheese.ca/root>.
  
  SHYTE is _S_imple _HY_per_TE_xt.  Read the wackford(1), squeers(8), and
  shyte(5) manuals for details.
  
  WWW: http://www.mammothcheese.ca/
  
  --
  James Bailie <jimmy@mammothcheese.ca>
  http://www.mammothcheese.ca
  
  PR:             ports/151649
  Submitted by:   James Bailie <jimmy at mammothcheese.ca>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2268    +1 -0      ports/net/Makefile
  1.1       +24 -0     ports/net/wackford-squeers/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/wackford-squeers/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +13 -0     ports/net/wackford-squeers/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/net/wackford-squeers/pkg-plist (new)
